metadata.description: Metal material properties for crafting system - stat bonuses applied to weapons/armor
metadata.usage: Material properties define stat bonuses based on item type. itemTypeTraits apply bonuses to weapon, armor, socket, enchantment, or jewelry.
notes: Materials apply different bonuses based on item type (weapon vs armor vs jewelry)
Shared traits always apply; itemTypeTraits apply only to matching item types
Runtime: Pick material by rarityWeight → Apply shared + itemTypeTraits[itemType] → Calculate final stats
